sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for BLUE_1417_CARBON_PLATE, part no. MKK-100103, supplied by 한일산업 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents part approval information including revision history, raw material list, QC process chart, control plan, and inspection criteria.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE_1417_CARBON_PLATE and model/part number is MKK-100103.
Applicable models are G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, and G1417FWP.
Supplier is ㈜ 한일산업 and customer is ㈜H&abyz.
Raw material list identifies prepreg USN250 with Toray as maker.
QC process chart is for mass production and includes incoming material, external processing, shipping inspection, and packaging controls.
